programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Oona and Baba get lost in the fog, but luckily Mossy and the Shrew Crew come to the rescue.
Oona is practicing her fishing skills. When the seagulls steal Oona's fish, she realises that she must learn to take off from the sea to avoid the crafty gulls.
Happy worries when all his friends are too busy to play with him.
Sticky Gecko: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.
The Wizard of Oswaldo: In search of an item for his mum, Oswaldo seeks help from a home improvement store wizard.
Ladies Forever: Leia discovers an all-girl secret group at school and joins them on their next mission.
When Daniel's pet fish dies, he begins to ask questions about what happened to help him understand, and how to handle the emotions that often come with losing someone you love.
It's Lead's birthday and everyone has one of Helium'sprecious balloons, but all Lead really wants is a go on the see saw.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'w', and they go on an adventure around the sound. They play in some water, see a worm and wear some wigs!
Glitch and his grimbots have a long race along the Great Wall of China.
Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They'll need to be especially creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!
The Art of Piggly: Piglet boasted a little too much about his sculptures and panics when Fifi organizes a big exhibition in his honor. Will he tell Fifi the truth?
Boring Town: The Astro-Heroes forbid everything in Minusville: music, games, laughter. Oli refuses these unfair rules. That's when she discovers what they're hiding.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: A Game of Chicken: Fur Taxi hasn't gotten a single customer all day. Lex and Plu need to act! They need to earn 100 positive reviews to raise their rating.
Rock and Roll Doodle Part 2: Doodle's favourite grunge band comes to play at camp, but the campers need to build a windmill to give the band enough electricity to play super loud
Egg Pictures: The campers bring pictures of themselves as eggs into camp. But Doodle is missing and Odo worries it's because Doodle is adopted.
While trying to understand why Mel keeps postponing getting her hair brushed, Hugo and Sonia learn to ask the right questions. (SL)
Hugo and Sonia have different ideas on what is the best watermelon for the family, until they learn to compromise. (SL)
Mushroom Riddle Crowd: Fuzzy Yellow's time-and-space travelling friend XYZ poses a riddle, and a horde of talking mushrooms offers answers. (SL)
Oona and Baba get lost in the fog, but luckily Mossy and the Shrew Crew come to the rescue.
Oona is practicing her fishing skills. When the seagulls steal Oona's fish, she realises that she must learn to take off from the sea to avoid the crafty gulls.
Happy worries when all his friends are too busy to play with him.
Top of the Mountain: The friends go on a mountain hiking competition.
Henry meets a friendly old Racing Car. Henry learns about engines and finds out that Racing Car has never actually finished a race. Henry becomes a Racing Driver for the day.
Painting: Myrtle needs the town hall to be in perfect condition, but there's a tiny smudge on the front door.
Heavy: Morris has a surprise for Pearl... new weightlifting equipment. Stan helps Morris deliver it all to their houseboat, but it's so heavy the boat starts to sink.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Creepy Crawly Courage: Yong Bao's fear of creepy crawlies and Carly's disgust for skunks complicate their apple delivery to the Harvest Festival.
It's Time for Mother's Day: JoJo, Gran Gran, Mummy and Great-Gran-Gran have a special day ahead of them to celebrate Mother's Day.
Mr. Peek's List: Mr. Peek's memory isn't what it used to be, so he writes his To-Do's on a List.
The Record Breaking Zoo: Jimmy, reading a Bumper Book of Records, decides that he'd like to find a record to break.
Tá Peppa ag iarraidh dialann a choinneáil ó tharla go raibh ceann ag Mummy Pig nuair a bhí sí féin an aois chéanna le Peppa.
Tá Grandpa Pig ag taispeáint do Peppa agus George le galf a imirt, ach is fearr leo i bhfad an spraoi a bhíonn ar an gcúrsa mionghailf atá in aice leis.
Síofra and Fionn go on an adventure to find the source of a mysterious music. Geróid learns how to whistle.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Gulliver is sad because he thinks he can't play any instruments.
Scavenger Hunt: Reggie and the others decide to play a treasure hunt game with Archie.
Andy And The Snares Penguins: Andy heads to forests of New Zealand to find out how Snare's penguins get clean.
Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojo's tops can reach him. They'll need to be especially creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

Mission: Bumpy Bits: Kika and Dr Amit are off to the florists following a secret trail of 'bumpy bits'.
Triggs' Teddy: Triggs' favourite teddy is a bit stinky and needs a wash, but poor Triggs is worried and doesn't want to let go. Can Maddie help reassure him that everything will be okay?

Dee encourages a friend to say 'coat' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programmes.show_name: Nina And The Neurons: Go Engineering
programmes.show_description: Mobile Phones: Engineers Kaitlyn and Reo visit Nina in her workshop and discover that mobile phones work by using signals.

Téann Mummy, Daddy, Peppa agus George chuig an bpáirc agus casann siad lena gcairde. Bíonn siad ag luascadh ar bharraí moncaí, ag léim ar ghéag, agus ag spraoi sa bpuiteach.
Taispeánann Grampy Rabbit an bád tarrthála do Peppa agus George.

programmes.show_description: Mobile Phones: Engineers Kaitlyn and Reo visit Nina in her workshop and discover that mobile phones work by using signals.
Mission: Bumpy Bits: Kika and Dr Amit are off to the florists following a secret trail of 'bumpy bits'.
Tá mé Buartha: Foghlaimíonn BaBa go gcaithfidh tú é a bheith i ndáiríre nuair a deir tú brón orm.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Mossy feels unwell, so Oona offers to help by taking charge of the Shrew Crew for the day.
Oona learns to love her colourful beak.
Funny Faces is the funniest game ever in Sunny River.
Dad Baby: When Dad shows the kids how to use their old baby-harness, a new game is born: Dad Baby. However, dad is unprepared for the harsh realities of giving birth to a baby Bingo.
Chez Joubert: The students devise a plan to retrieve their confiscated toys from Joubert's house.
The Shape of The Black: Gibraltar offers a chance of no homework for a year to whoever captures his lake monster.
Daniel and Katerina go to the Enchanted Garden to pick strawberries, only to find that the strawberry plants are dead. They ask questions to help them understand what's happened.
Oxygen & Carbon are having fun playing video games at Sulfur's until one of the joysticks stops working.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'x', and they go on an adventure around the sound. They meet a Tyrannosaurus rex, a fox with chicken pox and an ox on a box!
The adventure-seeking superheroes race to fix the Leaning Tower of Pisa in Italy. But has it really been glitched?.
Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?
The Sneezy Stinky Sachet: A foul odor is pervading the city. The only one who can fix it is Monsieur Bobois, but he doesn't feel up to the task. Oli and Titus are certain he can.
Attack of the Zombellas: Fifi argues with Bella, who told her she sings off-key. But when Bella starts to sing, her shrill notes turn the townspeople into zombies.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Playing Armadillo: Lex and Plu have to deliver their passenger, an armadillo named Hops, back home from his vacation.
Catch a Rainbow: When Odo accidentally loses Doodle's 'treasure' (a heart shaped rock), they go on a quest to reach the end of the rainbow where Odo is sure they'll find Doodle's treasure.
Whoops: When Doodle becomes embarrassed, she develops a cringe (she calls it a 'whoops') that spreads through camp.
When a cloudy night covers the twinkly stars, Hugo and Sonia discover other natural wonder close by. (SL)
When something Sonia and Hugo want isn't listed on the Family's Shopping List, they learn to appreciate what they do have. (SL)
Breathing Boom Treasure: Floating downstream on a raft, Fuzzy Yellow and Bennu fish for treasure, and find a musical adventure. (SL)
Mossy feels unwell, so Oona offers to help by taking charge of the Shrew Crew for the day.
Oona learns to love her colourful beak.
Funny Faces is the funniest game ever in Sunny River.
Detective Plom: Mae-Mae's vegetable patch is spoiled. Can detective Plom solve the mystery?
Henry meets a Cow and learns all about where milk comes from. Unfortunately the gate to the cow field has been left open and all the Cows have wandered off during the night.
Kite: Stanley helps Little Woo fly his kite, while Hattie is roasting some corn on her wind powered roaster.
Dinosaur: The school are creating a dinosaur to put on display at the museum.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Windmill Woes: After Thomas, Percy and Diesel accidentally break a windmill, they all tell Gordon different version of what happened. Can Gordon uncover the truth?
It's Time for a Community Jam: At the community jam, everyone makes music together. Gran Gran gives JoJo a shaker to join in with the band.
Home: Wendy finds a nightingale with a sore wing, so Mr Peek puts it in the aviary where they can keep an eye on it.
Peeks Might Fly: It's haircut day at the Zoo, and while Mr. Peek is giving the gorilla a trim, Violet gets her balloon stuck in a tree.
Tugann an grúpa spraoi cuairt ar thearmann dúlra Mr Lion, áit a bhfuil feithidí beaga bídeacha, míolta agus féileacáin. Tugann Pedro a pheata Stephen, an cipíneach leis.
Tugann Madame Gazelle húlahúp do ghrúpa spraoi Peppa. Caithfidh siad an húlahúp a choinneáil ag casadh ar a mbásta.
Rúbaí is in training for her big race. Síofra and Oisín make sure she is well prepared.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, including Una the Owl.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, focusing in this episode on Pip the Squirrel.
Simon and his friends talk about the things they would do if it weren't raining.
A Mess of Their Own: Reggie and the others are overjoyed to discover a forest full of fruits and eat until they are full, prompting them to take a nap.
Andy And The Ring Tailed Lemurs: When Andy accidentally breaks a plaster cast of a ring-tailed lemur's footprint that Mr Hammond made, it's up to Andy to put things right.
Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?
